title: pre-flight.yml
description: Homelab stack pre-deployment requirements. Read by the preflight Ansible role before docker stack deploy.

secrets.description: Docker Swarm secrets to create before deploying. Idempotent — skipped if the secret already exists.

from_env.description: Name of the .env variable whose value becomes the secret data

from_file.description: Path to a file whose contents become the secret data. Use $VAR to reference a .env variable as the path.

directories.description: Data directories to create on the cluster's shared storage (relative to the iSCSI app-data mount) before deploying. Created on a cluster node by the preflight role.

path.description: Directory path relative to the selected shared mount, e.g. 'rstudio' or 'librenms/db'.

base.description: Which shared mount the path is relative to. Default: app_data.

owner.description: Owner uid (or username) for the directory.

group.description: Group gid (or group name) for the directory.

files.description: Files copied from the controller onto the cluster's shared storage before deploying (e.g. an SSH key a container bind-mounts).

from_env.description: .env variable holding the source path on the controller.

src.description: Literal source path on the controller.

suffix.description: Appended to the resolved source path, e.g. '.pub'.

dest.description: Destination path relative to the selected base.

base.description: Shared mount the dest is relative to. Default app_data.

optional.description: Skip silently if the source file is absent.

templates.description: Jinja templates (from the stack dir) rendered onto the cluster's shared storage. Templates can reference swarm_env_vars.

src.description: Template filename in the stack dir, e.g. 'ssh-config.j2'.

dest.description: Destination path relative to the selected base.

base.description: Shared mount the dest is relative to. Default app_data.

validate.description: Pre-deployment validation checks. Ansible fails with a clear message if any check fails.

env.description: Environment variable names that must be non-empty in .env before deploying.

labels.description: Node labels — at least one Swarm node must carry each label before deploying.
